turns.q: Is a damaged item handled differently from a normal return?
turns.replyTail:
a normal return is for when you simply don’t want the product. 
To point you to the right option, did you order directly from loopearplugs.com, or from another store/website (like Amazon)?

Message from Aura: Yes—typically a damaged/defective item is handled as a warranty/replacement issue, while a normal return is for when you simply don’t want the product. To point you to the right option, did you order directly from loopearplugs.com, or from another store/website (like Amazon)?
